title: Simbalbara National Park
tagline: Simbalbara National Park — wildlife reserve of Himachal Pradesh

overview.short: Simbalbara National Park is a national park in India, located in the Kiyarda Dun valley of Sirmour District, Himachal Pradesh, along its border with Haryana.
overview.description: Simbalbara National Park is a national park in India, located in the Kiyarda Dun valley of Sirmour District, Himachal Pradesh, along its border with Haryana. It is also known as Col. Sher Jung National Park. The vegetation consists of dense Sal forests with grassy glades.

topPlaces.name: Lohgarh
topPlaces.description: Lohgarh is a city in the Bilaspur tehsil in the state of Haryana in India. It was the capital of the First Sikh State under Banda Singh Bahadur from 1710 to 1716.

topPlaces.name: Kalesar National Park
topPlaces.description: Kalesar National Park (13,000 acres (53 km2)) and adjacent Kalesar Wildlife Sanctuary (13,209 acres (53.45 km2) are protected areas in Kalesar of Yamunanagar district of Haryana state in India, 46 kilometres from Yamunanagar city, 122 kilometres (76 mi) from Chandigarh. Kalesar National Park was established in 2003.

items.note: Lohgarh is a city in the Bilaspur tehsil in the state of Haryana in India. It was the capital of the First Sikh State under Banda Singh Bahadur from 1710 to 1716.

Kalesar National Park (13,000 acres (53 km2)) and adjacent Kalesar Wildlife Sanctuary (13,209 acres (53.45 km2) are protected areas in Kalesar of Yamunanagar district of Haryana state in India, 46 kilometres from Yamunanagar city, 122 kilometres (76 mi) from Chandigarh. Kalesar National Park was established in 2003.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Simbalbara National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Simbalbara National Park is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Simbalbara National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chandigarh International Airport (71 km) and the nearest railway station is Dehradun Railway Station (56 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Simbalbara National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Simbalbara National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Simbalbara National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Simbalbara National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Simbalbara National Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Lohgarh, Kalesar National Park.
